title: Enovix Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
text: Q1 2026 Financial Results: Revenue: $7.6 million (up 49% year-over-year). Gross Profit: GAAP $1.6 million, Non-GAAP $2.0 million. Non-GAAP gross margin: 26.3%. Operating Cash Flow: $(33.1) million outflow. Free Cash Flow: $(36.3) million outflow. Net Loss per Share: $(0.18) GAAP / $(0.14) non-GAAP. Cash Position: $582.7 million in cash, equivalents, and marketable securities. Q2 2026 Guidance: Revenue: $8.0–$9.0 million. Non-GAAP Operating Loss: $(29.0)–$(32.0) million. Non-GAAP Net Loss per Share: $(0.13)–$(0.17). Capital Expenditures: $9.0–$13.0 million. Key Highlights: The company advanced smartphone battery qualification and began commercial production of silicon-anode smart eyewear batteries. CEO Raj Talluri noted alignment with lead smartphone customers on qualification frameworks, describing it as a significant step forward.
